{ "cells": [ { "cell_type": "code", "execution_count": 1, "id": "9c05969b-bd25-4ed8-aff0-ca313954433c", "metadata": {}, "outputs": [], "source": [ "import pandas as pd\n", "import numpy as np\n", "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n", "from sklearn.tree import DecisionTreeClassifier, export_text, plot_tree\n", "from sklearn.model_selection import KFold, cross_val_predict\n", "from sklearn.preprocessing import LabelEncoder\n", "from sklearn.metrics import accuracy_score, confusion_matrix, classification_report, ConfusionMatrixDisplay\n", "from sklearn import metrics\n", "\n", "# incarcarea bazei de date\n", "df = pd.read_csv('data/Teen_Mental_Health_Dataset.csv')\n", "\n", "# eliminam atributele stress_level, anxiety_level si addiction_level\n", "df = df.drop(['stress_level', 'anxiety_level', 'addiction_level'], axis=1)\n", "\n", "# transformam variabile text in numerice\n", "def encode_text(df, columns):\n", " le = LabelEncoder()\n", " for col in columns:\n", " df[col] = le.fit_transform(df[col])\n", " return df\n", "\n", "nume_atribute = ['age', 'gender', 'daily_social_media_hours', 'platform_usage', \n", " 'sleep_hours', 'screen_time_before_sleep', 'academic_performance', \n", " 'physical_activity', 'social_interaction_level']\n", "\n", "df = encode_text(df, ['gender', 'platform_usage', 'social_interaction_level'])\n", "\n", "# separare X (atribute) si y (scop)\n", "X = df[nume_atribute].values\n", "y = df['depression_label'].values\n", "\n", "# functie pentru rularea experimentului\n", "def experiment_arbore(k_fold_val, criteriu, adancime, min_leaf, nume_exp):\n", " print(f\"\\n\\n--- {nume_exp} (Criterion={criteriu}, MaxDepth={adancime}, MinLeaf={min_leaf}) ---\")\n", " \n", " # crearea modelului arborelui de decizie\n", " dt = DecisionTreeClassifier(criterion=criteriu, max_depth=adancime, \n", " min_samples_leaf=min_leaf, random_state=1)\n", " \n", " kf = KFold(n_splits=k_fold_val, shuffle=True, random_state=42)\n", " \n", " # realizarea clasificarii prin k-fold\n", " y_pred = cross_val_predict(dt, X, y, cv=kf)\n", "\n", " # calcularea acuratetii modelului si afisarea acesteia\n", " print(\"Accuracy:\", metrics.accuracy_score(y, y_pred))\n", " \n", " # afisare raport de clasificare\n", " print(classification_report(y, y_pred))\n", "\n", " # generare matrice de confuzie \n", " cm = confusion_matrix(y, y_pred)\n", " print(\"Matricea de confuzie:\\n\", cm)\n", " \n", " # antrenam modelul pe tot setul pentru a genera regulile si graficul\n", " dt.fit(X, y)\n", " \n", " # afisarea arborelui de decizie format text\n", " text_representation = export_text(dt, feature_names=nume_atribute)\n", " print(\"\\nStructura arborelui (Reguli):\")\n", " print(text_representation)\n", "\n", " # reprezentare grafica\n", " fig = plt.figure(figsize=(20,15))\n", " _ = plot_tree(dt, \n", " feature_names=nume_atribute, \n", " class_names=['No Depression', 'Depression'],\n", " filled=True, \n", " fontsize=10)\n", " plt.title(f\"Arbore de Decizie - {nume_exp}\")\n", " plt.show()" ] }, { "cell_type": "code", "execution_count": 2, "id": "70a04ab1-d983-47fb-87ce-bd67da77c4b8", "metadata": {}, "outputs": [ { "name": "stdout", "output_type": "stream", "text": [ "\n", "\n", "--- Arbore_Gini (Criterion=gini, MaxDepth=3, MinLeaf=5) ---\n", "Accuracy: 0.9725\n", " precision recall f1-score support\n", "\n", " 0 0.98 1.00 0.99 1169\n", " 1 0.33 0.06 0.11 31\n", "\n", " accuracy 0.97 1200\n", " macro avg 0.65 0.53 0.55 1200\n", "weighted avg 0.96 0.97 0.96 1200\n", "\n", "Matricea de confuzie:\n", " [[1165 4]\n", " [ 29 2]]\n", "\n", "Structura arborelui (Reguli):\n", "|--- sleep_hours <= 5.85\n", "| |--- daily_social_media_hours <= 5.05\n", "| | |--- class: 0\n", "| |--- daily_social_media_hours > 5.05\n", "| | |--- sleep_hours <= 4.65\n", "| | | |--- class: 0\n", "| | |--- sleep_hours > 4.65\n", "| | | |--- class: 0\n", "|--- sleep_hours > 5.85\n", "| |--- class: 0\n", "\n" ] }, { "data": { "image/png": "iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAABiIAAASrCAYAAAAfAqCCAAAAOnRFWHRTb2Z0d2FyZQBNYXRwbG90bGliIHZlcnNpb24zLjEwLjgsIGh0dHBzOi8vbWF0cGxvdGxpYi5vcmcvwVt1zgAAAAlwSFlzAAAPYQAAD2EBqD+naQABAABJREFUeJzs3XdcVXUDx/HvZW+4gMhQVNx75EjFLbg1R1qas8xsmtlSy6aVadkytbTUyp17gVtcuXJkmtscOUFRBBnn+cPkkcTN9YB83q+Xr5577u+c870XHpTzvef3sxiGYQgAAAAAAAAAAMAG7MwOAAAAAAAAAAAAHlwUEQAAAAAAAAAAwGYoIgAAAAAAAAAAgM1QRAAAAAAAAAAAAJuhiAAAAAAAAAAAADZDEQEAAAAAAAAAAGyGIgIAAAAAAAAAANgMRQQAAAAAAAAAALAZiggAAAAAAAAAAGAzFBEAAAC4K19++aUsFovKlClzx/suX75cFotF06ZNs0Gy++Odd96RxWLJsuP9+OOPslgs6X9cXFwUGBioevXq6aOPPtLJkyez7FyZOXjwoCwWi3788cc72i+r34e7lZycrMDAwLv+vqpbt+5dfS9nB2lpafrpp5/UqFEjBQQEyNHRUT4+Pnr44Yc1dOhQnT59OsP4ggULqlu3bnd1rm7duqlgwYL3HhoAAAC5CkUEAAAA7srYsWMlSX/88YfWr19vcpoHxw8//KC1a9cqOjpa33zzjSpUqKBPPvlEJUuW1OLFi2123qCgIK1du1bNmjW7o/2eeuoprV271kapbt/cuXN14sQJSdKYMWNMTnP/XLp0SY0bN1aXLl3k6+urL7/8UkuWLNFPP/2k+vXr69NPP1Xr1q0z7DNjxgy99dZbd3W+t956SzNmzMiK6AAAAMhFHMwOAAAAgJxn48aN2rp1q5o1a6Z58+ZpzJgxqlat2i33S01NVUpKyn1IeEVCQoLc3Nzu2/myQpkyZVS5cuX0x23bttXLL7+s8PBwtWnTRnv27FHevHmz/LzOzs56+OGH73i/fPnyKV++fFme506NGTNGTk5OqlOnjqKionTkyJHbynU/v0cMw1BiYqJcXV2z7Jh9+vRRdHS0fvnlFz3++OMZnmvevLkGDhyon3/+OcP2ihUr3vX5ChcufNf7AgAAIPfijggAAADcsaufOP/4449Vo0YNTZo0SQkJCRnGXJ3qZ8iQIfrggw9UqFAhOTs7a9myZeljEhMT1bdvXwUGBsrV1VV16tTRli1brjvf7NmzVb16dbm5ucnT01MRERHXfQr/6hRBmzdvVrt27WS1WtMvmhqGoREjRqhChQpydXWV1WpVu3bttH///tt6vfPmzVOFChXk7OysQoUKaejQoZmOu9fz3EhoaKiGDRum+Ph4jRo1KsNzGzduVMuWLeXr6ysXFxdVrFhRU6ZMue4YR48e1dNPP638+fPLyclJwcHBateuXfpdBJlNzXTtVFH//XPw4EFJN56aafLkyapevbrc3d3l4eGhRo0aZfq1zQrHjh3TwoUL1aJFC7366qtKS0vLdIqpbt26ycPDQ9u3b1dkZKQ8PT3VoEGDDGNWrVqlhx9+WK6urgoJCdFbb72l1NTUDGPOnj2rZ599ViEhIXJyclJYWJgGDBigpKSkDOMsFouef/55jRw5UiVLlpSzs7PGjRsnSdqzZ486duyogIAAOTs7q2TJkvrmm2/u6HUfP35cY8eOVbNmza4rIa5yc3NTz549M2z779RMV6dKmzhxogYMGKDg4GB5eXmpYcOG2r1793XvIVMzAQAA4E5RRAAAAOCOXLp0SRMnTlSVKlVUpkwZ9ejRQ/Hx8Zo6dWqm47/88kstXbpUQ4cO1YIFC1SiRIn05/r376/9+/fr+++/1/fff69jx46pbt26GS7c//LLL2rVqpW8vLw0ceJEjRkzRrGxsapbt65iYmKuO1+bNm1UpEgRTZ06VSNHjpQk9erVS3369FHDhg01c+Z
